title: DISCOVERY - 211info
text: EMERGENCE FLORENCE DISCOVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance to those seeking: Oregon DMV certificates; Occupational driver's licenses; resolution of court or corrections requirements; fulfillment of DUII and DMV requirements; or other diversion purposes. 4969 Highway 101 Suite 3 Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 997-8509 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 997-8509 After hours emergency (541) 607-4821 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service, OHP, private insurance, sliding scale DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: No standard hours Services: Diversion Programs DUI Offender Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - THRESHOLD INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EMERGENCE FLORENCE
